effects.name: Apply Bonus
effects.description: Applies a typed numeric bonus to a target stat or roll domain, optionally scoped by a selector.

effects.name: Apply Condition
effects.description: Applies a status condition to a target.

effects.name: Damage Roll
effects.description: Deals damage using dice formula and typed damage channels.

effects.name: Healing Roll
effects.description: Restores hit points using a dice formula.

effects.name: Grant Temporary HP
effects.description: Grants temporary hit points for a duration.

effects.name: Summon Entity
effects.description: Summons an entity template into encounter state.

effects.name: Grant Tag
effects.description: Grants a capability or rules tag used by runtime logic.

effects.name: Metamagic Modifier
effects.description: Declares spell slot adjustment and behavior token for metamagic feats.
